basic_details.organization_name: Office of the Excise Commissioner, Uttar Pradesh, Prayagraj
basic_details.short_information: UPSSSC Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 722 vacancies for Excise Constable posts. Candidates can apply online only from 04.06.2026 to 24.06.2026 through UPSSSC website upsssc.gov.in.

application_fee.general_fee: To be paid separately by shortlisted candidates only, before downloading the Main Exam admit card.

qualification.education_qualification: Candidates who have served in the Territorial Army for at least two years, OR have obtained the 'B' Certificate of the National Cadet Corps (NCC), will be given preference in case of equal merit.

selection_process: PET-2025 Normalised Score Shortlisting → Written Examination (Main) → Physical Standard Test (PST) → Physical Efficiency Test (PET)
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the UPSSSC official website upsssc.gov.in. No application through any other mode will be accepted. Candidates must login using their PET-2025 Registration Number via OTP sent to their registered mobile number / email.
seo_tags: UP Excise Constable Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 722 Posts
